default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content deliverables, social media posts, and metrics for Metronome's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matthew Panzarino is taking over Ada's role to optimize content pipelines and improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Social media posts need refinement: shorter length, less marketing-focused, more straightforward](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Metrics dashboard (via Looker) and Scrunch monitoring for LLM presence coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Video clip status update expected later today](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Handover

  - [Matthew Panzarino replacing Ada for Sprint projects](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Focus on improving output quality and closing feedback loop](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Deliverables to maintain current schedule, aiming for quicker turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [Sydney uploading articles to Webflow and publishing immediately](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [New process: Megan to provide special asset for pillar piece via shared Google folder](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Matthew to automate image pipeline from Asana to Drive](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)

### Social Media Post Refinement

  - [Feedback from team incorporated into next round](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Goals: Less marketing-focused, more straightforward, shorter length](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Employee posts limited to 2-3 small paragraphs for better adoption](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Metronome account posts also to be shortened](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Metrics and Monitoring

  - [Looker dashboard coming next week with:](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [GSC traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [Cohorted analysis of published content](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [GEO tracking and LLM referral sources](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Scrunch monitoring:](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [20 core prompts expanding to 100-150 iterations](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Weekly screenshot reports until client dashboard available](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [LLM content indexing observed within 1-1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Content Planning

  - [Team deciding on anchor piece for week three](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Maggie to review four outlines this afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to shorten social media posts for week two by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Matthew to review Scrunch prompts and align with priorities](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Matthew to provide status update on video clips today](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Team to inform GrowthX about chosen anchor piece for week three](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Maddy to share finalized social posts with executive team tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Matthew to deliver Looker dashboard and Scrunch reports next week](https://fathom.video/share/TD-ZQN6ayRPyxkqJt7xmQvqPoeAybs2k?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

action_items.description: Create shared Google folder for Metronome to upload pillar piece images
Coordinate with design team to upload pillar piece images to new shared folder by Monday morning
Shorten week 2 social media posts, maintain essence, incorporate Stephanie's edits
Finalize selection of week 3 anchor piece, share decision with GrowthX team
Review existing Scrunch prompts, align with Metronome priorities, prepare for next call discussion
Check status of video clips with production team, provide update to Metronome team today
